data.title: LILT Launches Assist: An Autonomous Agent to Run Global Content Programs
data.description: The introduction of LILT goes beyond basic translation to encompass smart organization of content workflows, brand management, and live data analysis for businesses. On March 26, 2026, SAN FRANCISCO, LILT, recognized as the leading enterprise AI platform for multiple languages, revealed the debut of its latest features.

data.title: The Finnish Financial Supervisory Authority has granted Stephen Industries Inc Oy and Kustaa Poutiainen a permanent exemption from the obligation to launch a mandatory public takeover bid
data.description: The Finnish Financial Supervisory Authority has approved a permanent exemption for Stephen Industries Inc Oy and Kustaa Poutiainen from the requirement to initiate a mandatory public takeover bid. This decision prohibits the publication, distribution, or release of this information, in whole or in part, directly or indirectly, in or into any jurisdiction.

data.title: CargoX and TradeSun Drive Secure Trade Efficiency With Launch of Automated Document Validation Prior Filing
data.description: In a joint partnership, CargoX and TradeSun have introduced Document Validation, a new verification layer aimed at enhancing document accuracy and reducing delays in cargo clearance. This integrated solution is designed to ensure consistency in documents before submission, minimizing exceptions and rework. As emphasized by the World Trade Organization, the accuracy and reliability of documents are crucial for international trade processes involving an average of 20-30 entities and 40 documents per customs transaction. This initiative seeks to streamline operations and enhance trust among all stakeholders involved in the supply chain.

data.title: Sandbox VR Accelerates Growth, Hitting $300M in Lifetime Sales and Scaling to more than 80 Global Locations, Continued Expansion Underway through 2026
data.description: Sandbox VR, a top provider of location-based virtual reality adventures, is set to significantly expand its presence in Europe, the United States, and Canada. With upcoming expansions planned, the company is solidifying its position as a leader in the industry. Based in San Francisco, as of March 26, 2026, Sandbox VR offers unparalleled virtual reality experiences, attracting a large following worldwide.

data.description: Today, on Thursday, March 26, 2026, the Annual General Meeting of Eimskipafélag Íslands hf. took place, where the updated Articles of Association of the Company were disclosed.
